title: curatella coriacea
intro: Curatella coriacea, also known as the caimito or cupania, is a small, evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Curatella coriacea include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used externally to soothe skin irritations or internally to promote overall well-being.
